data.title: Intercos Updates By-laws After Partial Execution of Performance Share Capital Increase
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Intercos S.p.A. ( (IT:ICOS) ) has provided an announcement.

Intercos S.p.A., a major global B2B cosmetics manufacturer specializing in make-up, skincare and hair and body care products for leading and emerging beauty brands, has built a sizeable international footprint with research centers, production plants and commercial offices on three continents. Leveraging decades of industry experience, it serves a wide range of clients and price segments while positioning itself as a trendsetter in the beauty market.

The company has updated and published its By-laws following the partial execution of a share capital increase linked to its 2023–2025 Performance Shares Plan, making the revised document available at its registered office, on its corporate website and via an authorized storage mechanism. The move formalizes the recent capital change, enhances transparency for investors and other stakeholders, and underscores the ongoing implementation of its long-term incentive program tied to performance shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ICOS) stock is a Hold with a EUR13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intercos S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ICOS Stock Forecast page.

More about Intercos S.p.A.

Intercos Group is a leading global business-to-business player in the creation, production and marketing of cosmetic make-up, skincare, and hair and body care products for major national and international brands, emerging labels and beauty retailers. Founded in 1972 by Dario Ferrari, the group employs over 6,000 people and operates 12 research centers, 15 production plants and 16 commercial offices across three continents, positioning itself as a long-standing trendsetter in the cosmetics industry.

For more than 50 years, Intercos has focused on interpreting beauty trends and anticipating new developments in the cosmetics world, offering products that cover all price ranges and catering to a broad client base. Its extensive global footprint and deep R&D capabilities support its role as a key supplier to leading cosmetics brands and reinforce its competitive position in the international beauty value chain.

Average Trading Volume: 115,272

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.11B

See more insights into ICOS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: XCHG Limited Launches 2026 Share Incentive Plan to Bolster Talent and Growth
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from XCHG Limited Sponsored ADR ( (XCH) ) is now available.

On March 9, 2026, XCHG Limited’s board of directors approved a 2026 Share Incentive Plan aimed at attracting and retaining key employees, directors and other eligible personnel seen as critical to the company’s long-term success. The plan, adopted under the company’s home-country practices, authorizes the issuance of up to 1,492,028,626 ordinary shares through equity-based awards, underscoring an increased reliance on stock compensation to align management and staff interests with shareholders and support growth across its subsidiaries.

The adoption of the plan, formally reported in a March 12, 2026 filing, signals a strategic move to bolster talent retention amid intensifying competition in the energy and e-mobility infrastructure space. By tying a large pool of potential new shares to performance and service conditions, XCHG is reinforcing its capital markets toolkit, with possible implications for future dilution but also for incentivizing execution of its expansion strategy in Europe and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (XCH) stock is a Hold with a $0.98 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on XCHG Limited Sponsored ADR stock, see the XCH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on XCH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, XCH is a Neutral.

XCHG Limited faces significant financial and technical challenges. The company’s inability to achieve profitability and negative cash flow, combined with bearish technical indicators, weigh heavily on its stock score. The absence of valuation metrics further complicates the investment outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on XCH stock, click here.

More about XCHG Limited Sponsored ADR

XCHG Limited is a foreign private issuer with principal executive offices in Hamburg, Germany, and Kyle, Texas, operating through XCharge Europe GmbH and XCharge Energy USA Inc. The group is active in the energy and charging infrastructure sector, focusing on technologies and services that support electric mobility and related power solutions in its key markets in Europe and the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 39,005

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $92.74M

Learn more about XCH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NextEnergy Solar Fund Cuts Dividend to Shift Towards Total Return Strategy
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited ( (GB:NESF) ) is now available.

NextEnergy Solar Fund is overhauling its strategy after a difficult strategic review, shifting its focus from a high income model to delivering total returns of 9%-11% through both dividends and net asset value growth. The board will maintain this year’s dividend but from FY27 will link payouts to 75% of operating free cash flow, implying a lower dividend range of 4.0p-4.6p.

The reduced dividend is intended to free around £40m over five years to strengthen the balance sheet, cut leverage toward a 40%-45% loan-to-value target and finance upgrades to solar assets and new battery storage, with storage planned to reach 30% of the portfolio. The fund has completed a capital recycling programme with £46.2m of asset sales and plans further disposals, as the board sees conserving cash rather than a managed wind-down or buybacks as the most viable route to restoring value amid a wide discount to NAV and weak demand for mature solar assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:NESF) stock is a Hold with a £56.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited stock, see the GB:NESF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:NESF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:NESF is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by sharply deteriorating operating results (collapsing revenue and two years of net losses) and weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These negatives are partly offset by strong, improving operating cash flow, a debt-free balance sheet in 2025, and a very high dividend yield, but not enough to outweigh the earnings and trend weakness.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:NESF stock, click here.

More about NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited

NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited is a London-listed investment company focused on owning and operating solar energy assets, with a growing emphasis on integrating energy storage. Its portfolio consists mainly of UK solar farms, and it targets long-term total returns for shareholders through a mix of income and capital growth in the renewable infrastructure sector.

Average Trading Volume: 2,796,605

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Learn more about NESF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: AITX Secures New Orders for Autonomous Security Devices
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions ( (AITX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions, Inc. and its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices, Inc. reported new direct and channel sales totaling four autonomous security devices, all licensed with the company’s SARA agentic AI platform. The orders include a ROSA unit for a global liquor distributor and three RIO 360 devices for a channel partner, with all systems pending deployment and intended to help clients address staffing shortages and rising security costs.

Management said the latest wins illustrate steady demand from both enterprise customers and integrator partners, strengthening AITX’s position in AI-powered security and operational intelligence across multiple market segments. The company highlighted growing channel partner engagement and repeat orders as evidence that its autonomous solutions are proving their value in the field, and it plans to showcase its full portfolio and live “Detection to Resolution” architecture to security professionals and partners at the ISC West 2026 trade show.

The most recent analyst rating on (AITX) stock is a Sell with a $0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions stock, see the AITX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AITX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AITX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by stressed financial fundamentals—deep losses, persistent negative equity, and continued cash burn—despite strong recent revenue growth and solid gross margin. Corporate updates are consistently positive (repeat orders, product expansion, and recurring-license strategy), but technical signals are largely unavailable and valuation metrics are limited due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on AITX stock, click here.

More about Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions, Inc. is a Detroit-based provider of AI-driven security and productivity solutions, primarily operating through its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices, Inc. The company offers stationary and mobile robotic security systems and its SARA agentic AI platform under a Solutions-as-a-Service model, targeting the nearly $50 billion security and guarding services market across enterprise, government, transportation, critical infrastructure, education, and healthcare sectors.

RAD’s in-house developed technologies and AI analytics aim to reduce clients’ security and monitoring costs by 35% to 80% compared with traditional manned guarding. The company’s operations and internal controls have been validated through a SOC 2 Type 2 audit, supporting credibility with enterprise and government customers, and it reports a prospective sales pipeline that includes more than 35 Fortune 500 companies and numerous other opportunities.

AITX and RAD are led by founder and CEO/CTO Steve Reinharz, who holds leadership roles within key security industry associations. The broader leadership team brings experience from security services, law enforcement, and robotics, which the company positions as a foundation for delivering practical and disruptive autonomous security solutions that enhance situational awareness and allow human personnel to focus on higher value tasks.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $10.71M

For a thorough assessment of AITX stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: GlobalFoundries Prices Mubadala Secondary Share Offering, Launches $300 Million Buyback
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

GlobalFoundries Inc ( (GFS) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 11, 2026, GlobalFoundries announced the pricing of a secondary public offering of 20 million ordinary shares at $42.00 per share, all sold by Mubadala Technology Investment Company, a subsidiary of its largest shareholder. The deal, which includes a 30-day option for underwriters to buy up to 3 million additional shares, is expected to close on March 13, 2026, with GlobalFoundries itself receiving no proceeds.

Concurrently, GlobalFoundries agreed to repurchase $300 million of the selling shareholder’s ordinary shares from the underwriters at the same price they pay in the offering, funded with cash on its balance sheet under a $500 million repurchase authorization approved in February 2026. The transaction slightly reduces Mubadala’s stake while signaling GlobalFoundries’ capital-return strategy and balance sheet strength, without affecting the size or economics of the repurchase if the underwriters’ option is exercised.

The most recent analyst rating on (GFS) stock is a Buy with a $58.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GlobalFoundries Inc stock, see the GFS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GFS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GFS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial footing (low leverage and strong cash generation) and a constructive technical trend. Earnings-call signals are supportive (margin expansion, design wins, acquisitions and buyback) but tempered by near-term revenue softness and investment-driven free-cash-flow pressure. Valuation is a clear drag due to the provided negative P/E and lack of a dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GFS stock, click here.

More about GlobalFoundries Inc

GlobalFoundries Inc. is a leading manufacturer of essential semiconductors used in automotive, smart mobile devices, the internet of things, communications infrastructure and other high-growth markets. The company operates a global manufacturing footprint across the U.S., Europe and Asia, positioning itself as a trusted, secure and sustainable foundry partner for customers worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 4,527,310

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $24.51B

JiaChen Holding Group Limited has scheduled a board meeting for 25 March 2026 to review and approve the audited consolidated results of the company and its subsidiaries for the financial year ended 31 December 2025. The timing of the meeting indicates that the company is preparing to release its annual results to the market via its own website and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange platform. Gentian Diagnostics ASA ( (DE:6FK) ) just unveiled an update.

Gentian Diagnostics has completed the latest round of its Employee Share Purchase Program, offering new shares to staff at NOK 32.58 per share, with a maximum subscription of NOK 100,000 per employee. data.title: TotalEnergies Restarts Libya’s Mabruk Oil Field With New 25,000 bpd Unit
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ).

TotalEnergies has restarted production at the onshore Mabruk oil field in Libya, where it holds a 37.5% stake, after output was halted in 2015. The field, located in concession C17 about 130 km south of Sirte, is now supported by a new production unit with capacity of 25,000 barrels per day, brought online on February 28, 2026, less than two years after construction began.

The company highlighted the restart as a sign of its long-term commitment to Libya, where it has operated since 1956 and produced an average of 113,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day in 2025 from several fields including Al Jurf, El Sharara, Mabruk and the Waha concessions. Management emphasized that Mabruk’s low-cost, low-emissions output aligns with TotalEnergies’ strategy and supports its target of achieving 3% annual production growth through 2030, reinforcing its position in North Africa’s upstream oil sector.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies SE is a global integrated energy company active in oil, biofuels, natural gas, biogas, low-carbon hydrogen, renewables and electricity. With more than 100,000 employees and operations in about 120 countries, the group focuses on providing reliable, affordable and more sustainable energy, placing sustainability at the core of its strategy and projects.

Find detailed analytics on TTE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
